name: Pururun! Shizuku-chan
original_name: ぷるるんっ!しずくちゃん
overview:
Pururun! Shizuku-chan is a popular child-aimed anime/manga series. It debut on 2003 as a manga series that grew popular throughout its years. Three years after its manga debut, on October 7, 2006, it was released on TV Tokyo as an anime running for two seasons towards September 2008.

A third season, Picchipichi Shizuku-chan, ran from October 2012 to September 2013. It was produced by Asahi Production.

trailers.title: ちょい見せ「ぷるるんっ！しずくちゃん」| First Look "SHIZUKU"(2006)
